name: SuperFly Golf Lounge - Littleton
address: 2100 W Littleton Blvd suite c, Littleton, CO 80120
about: SuperFly Golf Lounge - Littleton is a modern indoor golf venue that blends cutting-edge TrackMan 4 simulator technology with a lounge atmosphere. The facility offers year-round golfing access, allowing players to practice and play on over 250 world-class courses regardless of weather conditions. Memberships provide exclusive access to the simulators, premium amenities, and a curated drink menu, while non-members can book bays by the hour. The venue is designed for golf enthusiasts seeking a social yet technologically advanced experience, featuring data-driven swing analysis and a tight-knit community environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to TrackMan 4 technology with 250+ digital courses and swing analysis
Year-round indoor golfing with no weather restrictions
Lounge atmosphere with premium amenities and curated drinks
Community environment for golf enthusiasts of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Curated cocktails and drink menu available with membership discounts

simulator_hardware.notes: Pinnacle golfing technology with radar tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own clubs as the venue does not specify club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a curated drink menu, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A round typically lasts between 45 minutes to 1 hour per person when using auto putt settings.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, SuperFly welcomes golfers of all skill levels, including beginners and families.
